image.description: Image for vault-recovery-fabric custom jobs (recovery-job, rekey-job, tests). The vault server image is set via vault.server.image.

tag.description: Image tag; defaults to chart appVersion if empty

networkPolicy.description: Kubernetes NetworkPolicy resources for the Vault pods and recovery jobs

enabled.description: Deploy NetworkPolicy resources. Disable for local testing (values-lab.yaml)

allowClientNamespaces.description: Namespaces whose pods are allowed to reach the Vault server on port 8200

allowClientPodLabels.description: Pod label selector for additional clients allowed to reach Vault on port 8200

bootstrap.description: Vault initialisation settings. The bootstrap Job runs once on first install (post-install hook).

storeUnsealKeys.description: Store unseal keys in local Vault KV after init. Enable for lab auto-unseal; disable in production (keys must be handled out-of-band).

keyShares.description: Number of Shamir key shares generated by vault operator init

keyThreshold.description: Minimum shares required to unseal. Must be <= keyShares.

recoveryInitImage.description: Reference image for the recovery-prep initContainer. Keep in sync with vault.server.image.tag.

recovery.description: Cross-cluster recovery mesh configuration. Controls the recovery Job and pod-level initContainer unseal logic.

manualJob.description: Operator-triggered fan-out recovery Job. Only usable after at least one Vault cluster is unsealed (provides the fallback recovery source). Trigger: --set recovery.manualJob.triggerId=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)

triggerId.description: Non-empty string triggers the recovery Job. Must be a string (not a number). Reset to empty after recovery completes.

targets.description: List of Vault pod addresses to unseal. Already-unsealed pods are skipped.

keyThreshold.description: Minimum number of unseal keys required in the recovery material before attempting unseal.

podUnseal.description: Pod lifecycle assisted-unseal. The recovery-prep initContainer runs on every pod start and prepares a token for postStart to use.

enabled.description: Enable the recovery-prep initContainer and its ConfigMap. Disable to remove pod-level unseal automation entirely.

selfName.description: This cluster's name in the recovery mesh. Used to derive the local and fallback KV paths: secret/recovery/<selfName>/unseal-keys. Leave empty for legacy lab path (secret/vault/unseal-keys).

targets.description: List of Vault pod addresses to unseal during recovery. The recovery Job iterates these; already-unsealed pods are skipped.

fallback.description: External fallback Vault cluster. Used by the recovery Job and the pod-level initContainer when vault-active is unreachable.

k8sAuthPath.description: Kubernetes auth mount path on the fallback Vault (default: auth/kubernetes)

vaultRole.description: K8s auth role on the fallback Vault that accepts this cluster's vault and vault-recovery service account tokens

secretPath.description: KV path on the fallback Vault where this cluster's recovery material is stored. Derived from selfName if empty.

tlsSkipVerify.description: Skip TLS verification for the fallback Vault connection. Never use true in production.

cidr.description: CIDR of the fallback Vault for NetworkPolicy egress. Required when networkPolicy.enabled=true and triggerId is set.

rekeyVaultRole.description: K8s auth role on the fallback Vault for rekey syncFallback write. Defaults to vaultRole if empty. Requires write capability on the fallback KV path.

rekey.description: Vault unseal key rotation. EXPERIMENTAL — high-impact operation. Requires enabled+confirm+experimental triple confirmation.

enabled.description: First gate: must be true to render the rekey Job

experimental.description: Third gate: acknowledge this feature is experimental and destructive

confirm.description: Second gate: explicit confirmation that you understand the risk

syncFallback.description: After rekey, also update the fallback Vault with the new recovery material. Requires fallback.addr.

keyShares.description: Number of new Shamir key shares to generate

keyThreshold.description: New unseal threshold. Must be <= keyShares.

encryption.description: AES-256-CBC encryption for recovery material stored in the fallback Vault. When enabled, the passphrase is read from a Kubernetes Secret.

enabled.description: Encrypt recovery material before storing in fallback Vault. Enable in production/mesh mode.

passphraseSecret.description: Name of the Kubernetes Secret containing the 'passphrase' key.

autoGeneratePassphrase.description: Auto-generate passphrase Secret if it does not exist. Lab/dev only — in production, create the Secret manually before install.

vault.description: Passed through to the HashiCorp Vault Helm chart dependency. See https://developer.hashicorp.com/vault/docs/platform/k8s/helm/configuration

enabled.description: Use integrated Raft storage (recommended over Consul backend)

postStart.description: lifecycle.postStart.exec.command — handles unseal using token prepared by recovery-prep initContainer

createSecret.description: Create a long-lived SA token Secret. False by default; K8s 1.24+ uses projected tokens automatically.
